newspaper: Unknown (likely a São Paulo newspaper based on content)
date_of_article: Likely late December 1906, based on the date in the embedded letters.
original_snippet_context: A series of congratulatory letters and telegrams to Jorge Tibiriçá, President of São Paulo State, celebrating the successful agreement for the Convênio de Taubaté.
justification: The mentions of the Convênio de Taubaté are within the context of congratulations and general support for its successful agreement, without details or opinions on specific mechanisms like the "Caixa de Conversão" itself.
